title: Production gitnexus serve with runtime catalog and OAuth
body:
Coolify deploy exposes `gitnexus serve` on **8452** with `GITNEXUS_HOME` persistence, auth hub OAuth for analyze UI, and green post-deploy smoke against a sample compiler graph.

## Landed

- `gitnexus serve` runtime model documented in [`beskid_nexus/COOLIFY.md`](beskid_nexus/COOLIFY.md)
- Deploy matrix cross-links for nexus OpenBao path

## Remaining (production evidence required)

- Index compiler superrepo graph via repo owner UI or webhook
- Confirm hub launcher resolves production nexus URL
- Optional: `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` + `NEXUS_SPEC_ROOT` for code-doc maintenance

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Catalog tip:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) (2026-06-07)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `nexus`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-nexus-operational`

subtasks.text: gitnexus serve on port 8452 with volume
Auth hub OAuth for analyze UI
